title: wedelia burchellii
intro: Wedelia burchellii, also known as Sow Thistle or White Sow Thistle, is a flowering plant species belonging to the Asteraceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic properties. The health benefits of Wedelia burchellii include treating digestive issues, relieving fever and body aches, and promoting wound healing. The plant can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its leaves can also be used in salads or as a cooked green vegetable.
